About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 1984, Crown Lifters Ltd is a supplier of construction equipment for servicing
industrial sectors
[1]
Key Points
Fleet Portfolio
[1]
[2]
Crown Lifters Ltd. is a leading construction equipment rental company specializing in crane leasing. The company provides a fleet of advanced cranes, including:
a) Crawler Cranes
(Lattice Boom, Truck Mounted)
b) Telescopic Boom Cranes
(All Terrain, Rough Terrain, Truck Mounted)
c) Aerial Work Platforms
(Man Lifts, Scissor Lifts, Spider Lifts)
d) Piling & Excavation Equipment
(Piling Rigs, Vibro Hammers, Excavators)
